title: crassula littoralis
intro: Crassula littoralis, also known as the coastal crassula or succulent jade plant, is a type of succulent plant native to the coastal regions of South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Crassula littoralis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
